text:
Created attachment 231710
svn diff patch

This long overdue patch updates Motsognir to 1.0.13.

Excerpt from changelog[1]:

v1.0.13 [08 Jan 2021]
 - a warning is logged when a gophermap features a subgophermap while configuration forbids executing it
 - minor code cleanups
 - relicensed to the MIT license


[1] https://sourceforge.net/p/motsognir/code/HEAD/tree/tags/motsognir-1.0.13/changes.txt
